title: Advanced probability
subtitle: Use future and conditional for guessing.
overview: Spanish uses future and conditional to speculate.
This is common in natural speech.

items.en: Ana is not answering; she is probably busy.

items.es: Habrán salido ya porque la casa está vacía.
items.en: They have probably already left because the house is empty.

items.es: Cuando llegamos, serían las diez de la noche.
items.en: When we arrived, it was probably around ten at night.

items.es: El hombre tendría unos cincuenta años.
items.en: The man was probably around fifty years old.

items.es: No lo sé con seguridad, pero habrá sido un malentendido.
items.en: I do not know for sure, but it was probably a misunderstanding.
